sections.paragraph: μαρτύριον, ου, τό [μάρτυρ Aeolic form of μάρτυς] ‘that which serves to corroborate/attest’, testimony, witness Mt 8:4; Mk 6:11; Lk 21:13; Ac 4:33; 1 Cor 1:6; 2 Cor 1:12; 2 Th 1:10; 1 Ti 2:6; 2 Ti 1:8; Hb 3:5; Js 5:3. Special use σϰηνὴ τοῦ μαρτυρίου tent of testimony as sign of God’s presence Ac 7:44; Rv 15:5.
